title: VeloraOS 1.10.20 - Seamless Update Reconnect
releaseNotes: Treats temporary Nginx 502/503/504 responses during deployment as expected backend restart downtime instead of an update failure.
Keeps the update screen in Installing/Reconnecting state and automatically reconnects when the VeloraOS backend returns.
Prevents raw Nginx HTML error pages from being shown inside the update interface.
Only reports a failed update when the persisted VeloraOS update state records a real failure or another non-transient error occurs.
Preserves backend recovery, persistent TLS identity, Chat stability, model intelligence and PWA support.
